reasoning: Genuinely clever padding oracle design with multiple obfuscation layers — oracle hidden in SHA-256-derived tid field, custom XOR-masked ANSI X.923 padding, HMAC-based IV transformation, and PoW gating — all of which elevate it well above a textbook CBC oracle. However, the challenge is fundamentally broken: Docker build failed (tried to pip install local crypto_utils), challenge_data.json is empty, smoke test failed, and the intended-solution description references error codes (ERR_DSAS_001/002) that don't exist in the actual implementation. A well-architected challenge that never successfully deployed.
